## 变更类型 / Type of Change

- [ ] Bug 修复 / Bug fix
- [ ] 新功能 / New feature
- [ ] 重构 / Refactoring
- [ ] 样式调整 / Style/UI update
- [ ] 文档更新 / Documentation update

## 测试 / Testing

<!-- 描述你如何验证了这些变更 -->
<!-- Describe how you verified the changes -->

- [ ] 本地开发环境测试通过 / Tested locally in dev mode
- [ ] 生产构建 (`pnpm build`) 无报错 / Production build succeeds
- [ ] 已在浏览器中手动验证功能正常 / Manually verified in browser

## 截图 / 录屏 / Screenshots

## Checklist

- [ ] 代码遵循项目现有风格 / Code follows existing project style
- [ ] 自我审查了代码变更 / Self-reviewed the changes
- [ ] 注释使用中文 / Comments are written in Chinese
- [ ] 没有引入不必要的依赖 / No unnecessary dependencies added
